# JNC Fabrics — Janki Nath & Co.

JNC Fabrics is a premium woven fabric manufacturer and exporter based in Mayapuri, New Delhi, India. Established in 1968, we are a fourth-generation family business supplying export-grade woven fabrics to buyers across 20+ countries.

## Products
Cotton, cotton blends, linen, viscose, jacquard, dobby, yarn-dyed, printed, handloom, crepe, tweed, upholstery and home furnishing fabrics. Available in greige, RFD, dyed and printed finishes.

## Certifications
BCI (Better Cotton Initiative), GOTS (Global Organic Textile Standard), OCS (Organic Content Standard), OEKO-TEX Standard 100.

## Weaving Units
Meerut, Bhiwandi, Erode, Salem, Surat.

## Export Markets
USA, UK, Germany, France, Japan, Australia, UAE, South Korea, Scotland, Europe.
